title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Turmeric essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling and discomfort in the gums. The curcumin present in turmeric also has antibacterial properties that target the bacteria responsible for gum inflammation, preventing further damage to the teeth and surrounding tissues.
